scripts.dev: bun run --filter @snc/api dev & bun run --filter @snc/web dev
scripts.start: docker compose up -d --wait && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run --filter @snc/api db:migrate && bun run dev
scripts.test:unit: bun run --filter @snc/shared test && bun run --filter @snc/web test && bun run --filter @snc/api test:unit
